description:
responsibility of this directory

This directory is responsible for committing the job and task attempts. It includes classes that handle the commit process, such as CommitJobStage, CommitTaskStage, CreateOutputDirectoriesStage, LoadManifestsStage, RenameFilesStage, SaveTaskManifestStage, TaskAttemptScanDirectoryStage, and ValidateRenamedFilesStage.

how the files or child directories collaborate

The classes in this directory collaborate by passing data and dependencies to each other. For example, CommitJobStage uses the results of LoadManifestsStage and CreateOutputDirectoriesStage, while CommitTaskStage uses the output of TaskAttemptScanDirectoryStage.

the architectural role or pattern of this directory

This directory follows the Model-View-Controller (MVC) pattern, where the model represents the data and business logic, the view represents the user interface, and the controller handles the user interactions and updates the model and view accordingly. The MVC pattern helps to separate concerns and improve code maintainability and extensibility.
